creator: neil@darlow.co.uk
text:
After regenerating my ports tree things are working.

I've checked that compatibility-2.0.6 works with the plugins I use e.g.

password_forget-2.1
quota_usage-1.3.1
secure_login-1.2.8
timeout_user-1.1.1 and...
vlogin-3.9.1

For me, I can't see anything to prevent this update being committed.
